personalInfo.name: UDHAYAKUMAR R
personalInfo.title: Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
personalInfo.tagline: Passionate about creating intelligent solutions that transform data into actionable insights
personalInfo.bio: I'm a dedicated B.Tech AI & DS with a passion for leveraging cutting-edge technology to solve real-world problems. My journey in artificial intelligence and data science has equipped me with strong analytical skills and hands-on experience in machine learning algorithms, data visualization, and statistical modeling. I believe in the power of data-driven decision making and am constantly exploring new technologies and methodologies to stay at the forefront of this rapidly evolving field.
personalInfo.availability: Available for internships and entry-level positions

shortTerm: Build a strong portfolio of AI/ML projects
longTerm: Contribute to AI ethics and responsible AI development
